name: OpenTelemark and Feather Ending
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Feather Step, Hover Cross, Hover Feather, Natural Hover Telemark, Natural Telemark, Natural Twist Turn, Natural Zig-Zag from PP, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Top Spin
following_figure_names: Three Step, Change Of Direction, Basic Weave (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BDW, check, and Basic Weave), Reverse Turn (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BLOD near corner, check and Basic Weave turning 1/8, 1/8, 3/4; or 1/4, 1/8, 3/4; to end DW of new LOD), Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin (check back after step 6), Outside Swivel (check back after step 6), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot (at corner)
notes:
When leading to PP ending, Man left his LF there (like in spiral turn), there is no brush, LF then steps out in step 3 to PP.
Body turn less to PP. Keep body facing Lady.
It's different to do feather finish from PP. Lady really has to use this step 4 (S) and next step 5 (Q) to move a lot of space to keep up with Man.
Swing R hip forward, then allow feet to turn under the body.
Body never feels travel side ways. Body feels like traveling forward.
R side stretch diagonally.
Keep arms forward in front of body.
LF back in CBMP | Backing DW | TH | 1/8 between 5-6, body turns less | Sway(L) | up, NFR Lower e/o6

steps.action: LF fwd | FDC | HT | start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | rise e/o 1
RF to side | Backing DW | T | 1/4 between 1-2 | Sway(L) | Up
LF to side and slightly fwd in PP | Pointing DW | TH | 1/2 between 2-3. body turns less | Sway(S) | Up, lower e/o 3
RF fwd in PP and CBMP | Pointing DW | Body Facing Wall | HT | -- | Sway(S) | Rise e/o 4
LF diag fwd preparing to step OP | Facing DW | T | Sway(R) | Up
comments: When leading to PP ending, Man left his LF there (like in spiral turn), there is no brush, LF then steps out in step 3 to PP.

steps.action: RF fwd in CBMP, OP | Facing DW | TH | Sway(R) | Up, lower e/o 6
LF fwd | Facing DW | H | Sway(S) | CBM | --
RF back | BDC | TH | start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
LF closes to RF (Heel Turn) | LOD | HT | 3/8 between 1-2 | Sway(R) | continue to rise on 2
RF diag fwd in PP, R side leading | Pointing to LOD | TH | slight body turn to L | Sway(S) | Up, lower e/o 3
LF fwd and across in PP and CBMP | Pointing to LOD (Moving DW) | HT | start to turn L | Sway(S) | CBM | rise e/o 4
RF to side and slightly back | Backing Wall | TH | 1/4 between 4-5 | Sway(L) | up
LF back in CBMP | Backing DW | TH | 1/8 between 5-6, body turns less | Sway(L) | up, NFR Lower e/o6
RF back | Backing DW | T | -- | Sway(S) | CBM | --
